title: Psychotria fissicorne
intro: Psychotria fissicorne is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a medicinal plant due to its numerous health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, thanks to its ability to reduce oxidative stress and modulate the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria fissicorne include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Psychotria fissicorne is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and also used in the form of capsules or tinctures to harness its health benefits.
